statement.en: Fast Field Mapping of Large Size Bulk Superconductors at Variable Temperatures and Magnetic Fields
statement.summary: The authors thank Carnot ICEEL and the CAPMAT project (co-funded by FEDER-FSE Lorraine et Massif des Vosges 2014-2020) for their support and acknowledge Quentin Nouailhetas (now at Tokamak Energy, UK) for helping in the design of the sample holder.

proposer: Kévin Berger, Guijosa, Santiago, Frederic Trillaud et al.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 温度と磁場の変化の中で、超伝導の秩序パラメータが消失する根源的な構造を直感的に映す。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 超伝導体が温度と磁場の複雑な相互作用の中で保つ、対称性と秩序の消えゆく輪郭。
